title: 太平洋西北国家实验室与OpenAI合作，以加速联邦项目审批流程
description: OpenAI与太平洋西北国家实验室推出DraftNEPABench，这是一个新的基准测试，用于评估AI编码助手如何加速联邦项目审批——结果显示其有潜力将《国家环境政策法》草案起草时间缩短高达15%，并推动基础设施审查现代化。
titleZh: 太平洋西北国家实验室与OpenAI合作，以加速联邦项目审批流程
titleEn: Pacific Northwest National Laboratory partners with OpenAI to speed up federal project approval process
descriptionZh: OpenAI与太平洋西北国家实验室推出DraftNEPABench，这是一个新的基准测试，用于评估AI编码助手如何加速联邦项目审批——结果显示其有潜力将《国家环境政策法》草案起草时间缩短高达15%，并推动基础设施审查现代化。
descriptionEn: OpenAI and Pacific Northwest National Laboratory have launched DraftNEPABench, a new benchmark to evaluate how AI coding assistants can speed up federal project approvals—results showing its potential to reduce National Environmental Policy Act draft drafting time by up to 15% and modernize infrastructure reviews.

titleZh: 高盛谈AI交易：下半年“AI基础设施”面临风险“AI应用”“输家”面临反弹难
titleEn: Goldman Sachs on AI Trading: Risks for "AI Infrastructure" in the Second Half, "AI Application" "Losers" Face Difficulty Rebounding Soon
descriptionZh: 高盛警告称，下半年人工智能资本支出增速预计将放缓。
descriptionEn: Goldman Sachs warns that the growth rate of AI capital expenditure is expected to slow in the second half of the year. This inflection point will directly threaten AI infrastructure stocks heavily reliant on capital expenditure, causing their valuation premiums to collapse. For instance, Nvidia is already showing signs of "soaring profits but stagnant stock price."
